title: Random freeze
author: razing32
body_snippet:
I am currently experiencing random freezes of the tool on windows 10.
The app ,  when connecting to a host ,  sometimes freezes for half a minute , apparently randomly.
This prompts a unresponsive program error from windows.
Connection type : SSH

## Expected Behavior
Connection is instant and a new tab  opens with prompt

## Current Behavior
Connection sometimes hangs whole app to the point  of windows marking it unresponsive

## Possible Solution
Waiting or closing down RemoteNG co...

iterations.description: The issue description 'Random freeze' lacks sufficient detail (e.g., stack traces, steps to reproduce, specific context) to diagnose the root cause and plan an implementation.

comments.author: kees-z
comments.snippet: I can confirm this. It's not SSH only. mRemoteNG randomly freezes for about 30 seconds when connecting to a RDP session and having multiple other sessions open.

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet:
> I can confirm this. It's not SSH only. mRemoteNG randomly freezes for about 30 seconds when connecting to a RDP session and having multiple other sessions open.

Could you let me know what version you are with?

comments.author: kees-z
comments.snippet:
Seems to happen less frequently since some months ago, but it still freezes for 20-30 seconds every now and then.
I'm on v1.76.20.24669 (Portable edition).

comments.author: Kvarkas
comments.snippet: Could you please try nightly build to see if its same with it?

comments.author: kees-z
comments.snippet:
Unfortunately that's not easy to do for me. We use a highly customized combination of tools, the portable version of mRemoteNG being the central part of it. Scripts are used to roll out updates from a central Sharepoint library to user's local folders, lots of external apps are used, most of them launched using AutoIT scripts.
Overwriting the portable V1.76 version with the Nightly Build files breaks A LOT of things. One of the problems is that my setup requires settings, layout and extapps fil...
